title: MCPS1
body:
![MCPS1 LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dd0eb28f739d2ffa893f28256ead0eede5e973c_0.webp)

MCPS1 Modpack for 1.21.5

The MCPS1 Modpack is built to deliver a nostalgic, low-poly aesthetic reminiscent of classic PlayStation 1 games, perfectly tuned for Minecraft 1.21.5. Whether you're seeking that sweet retro vibe for your solo adventures or want a lightweight modpack for server play, MCPS1 brings a distinct look and feel to Minecraft without sacrificing functionality. This modpack focuses on visual downgrades, interface simplification, and performance optimization—creating an experience that feels like Minecraft through the lens of late-90s console gaming.

--- ![MCPS1 PREVIEW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a47b469c93c439c08c64a2670f5c2d3d62c5ef6.jpeg) --- ### Key features **Retro Visuals:** MCPS1 transforms the Minecraft world into a pixelated, low-res playground with textures and effects inspired by early 3D gaming on the PS1. **Performance Boosts:** Designed with low-spec compatibility in mind, this modpack trims excess features and includes optimization tools to ensure smooth gameplay even on older or less powerful machines. **Vanilla Server Compatibility:** Although created with a retro solo experience in mind, MCPS1 is fully compatible with any vanilla-friendly server, giving you flexibility to play how you want without compromising the throwback feel. ![MCPS1 COVER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/693e66c7494d30766cc7f9c59017d5b312fbfa30_0.webp)
